subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence and thou hast attained unto the meeting with thy Lord, and We have hearkened unto that which was therein and answered thee as a mercy from Our presence, and verily We [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و فاز بلقاء ربک و سمعنا ما فیه و اجبناک رحمه من لدنا و انا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
